ot_description: Moved the experience, relieving and F&F documents onto a pure-Java JasperReports engine with real templates, gating the letterhead to production only. Consolidated the offboarding screens under a collapsible menu group, standardized the letter cards on a single Generate PDF button with shadcn components, and fixed the employee My Resignation view to live-update through the richer exit-process screen.

standup.name: Smit Parekh
next: Fine-tune Jasper PDF layout (logo size, column widths, footer spacing) once rendered screenshots are reviewed
Optionally make active-resignation history collapsible and apply CC show-on-focus to the HR/Admin CC picker

tasks.name: JasperReports engine — experience & relieving letters
tasks.body: Built a pure-Java JasperReports PDF engine for the experience and relieving letters and wired a Generate button in the frontend.
tasks.summary:
- Added JasperReports dependency and LetterEngine.JASPER
- Created letter-jasper.jrxml (letterhead logo header + footer band with GPTW badge) and JasperLetterService composing dynamic body HTML matching the DOCX
- Routed both letter services through engine=JASPER; smoke test renders valid PDFs
- Added frontend Jasper engine type + generate button

tasks.name: F&F settlement statement via Jasper
tasks.body: Moved the F&F settlement statement off the HTML engine onto a dedicated Jasper template with a real per-month table.
tasks.summary:
- Created fnf-statement.jrxml (meta block, totals, month-by-month table bound to a datasource, note, signature, shared footer)
- FnfStatementServiceImpl now formats the settlement into a data map and renders via JasperLetterService.fnf
- Multi-template caching in JasperLetterService; removed dead buildHtml/esc
- Smoke test renders all three documents

tasks.name: Letterhead only in production
tasks.body: Jasper engine now honors app.letter.letterhead.enabled so stage/non-prod letters render plain.
tasks.summary:
- Gated logo, footer band and badge on a LETTERHEAD param via printWhenExpression in both templates
- Service streams the images only when enabled
- Verified: ~653KB with letterhead vs ~2KB without

tasks.name: Sidebar — collapsible Offboarding group
tasks.body: Consolidated the offboarding screens under one collapsible Offboarding menu group.
tasks.summary:
- My Resignation (moved out of MAIN), Resignations (renamed admin list), Exited Employees grouped under a collapsible header
- Chevron toggle, defaults open, each item still role-gated
- Reduces top-level menu clutter

tasks.name: DocumentCard shadcn Button + loading
tasks.body: Converted hand-rolled letter-card buttons to shadcn Button and added loading on View/Download.
tasks.summary:
- Replaced bare <button> with shadcn <Button> (hover, focus-ring, disabled for free)
- Per-action loading spinner + labels on View and Download blob fetches

tasks.name: Single Generate PDF button + validation
tasks.body: Standardized letter cards on one Generate PDF (Jasper) button with pre-generation gating.
tasks.summary:
- Hid Word Template / Quick PDF buttons; left one Generate PDF (engine=JASPER)
- Until a letter exists (rev 0), View/Download/Issue/Email/Roll-back disabled via a generated flag

tasks.name: SettlementCard shadcn Table
tasks.body: Converted the settlement month-by-month breakdown to the shadcn Table component.
tasks.summary:
- Replaced flattened flex text rows with aligned Month / Working Days / Payable Hrs / Paid Leave columns
- Horizontal scroll on narrow widths; consistent with the other offboarding tables

tasks.name: My Resignation live-updating view fix
tasks.body: Fixed the employee My Resignation screen not updating without a reload and not matching the old app UI.
tasks.summary:
- Redirected /my-exit to the rich /exit-process employee view (hero, to-dos, documents, apply form)
- That view polls every 15s, so admin updates now appear automatically
- Existing sidebar/header/notification links keep working via the redirect

tasks.name: CC search UX
tasks.body: Fixed the CC recipient picker so the eligible list shows on focus and filters as you type.
tasks.summary:
- Focus shows eligible recipients (backend returns all managers/HR/admins for empty query; employees never eligible)
- Live filtering, scrollable dropdown with hover, mousedown-preventDefault so selection isn't swallowed by blur
- Verified CC visibility: a CC'd manager sees the resignation even when not the reporting manager

tasks.name: Submit form on top + collapsible history
tasks.body: Reordered the employee revert view so the submit form is primary and history is collapsible.
tasks.summary:
- Moved the Submit Resignation form directly under the status notice
- History moved into a collapsed Previous history section that expands on click
- Rendered the toast in this branch for submit feedback

ot_pushed.summary: Moved the experience, relieving and F&F documents onto a pure-Java JasperReports engine with real templates, gating the letterhead to production only. Consolidated the offboarding screens under a collapsible menu group, standardized the letter cards on a single Generate PDF button with shadcn components, and fixed the employee My Resignation view to live-update through the richer exit-process screen.
